positive: Stylized minimalist depiction of a crescent moon embracing a forest silhouette. The scene features sparse, stylized sapling trees and abstract mountain ranges rendered with thick, continuous lines and clean negative space. Focus on deep midnight blue and electric cyan color palette, with stark contrast and golden yellow accents for the moon's glow. Central composition, designed for seamless textile printing. Clean vector aesthetic, high contrast silhouette art, pop art influence, flat graphic design, ink bleed effect on white fabric background.
negative: blurry, grainy, artifacts, text, watermark, low resolution, poorly drawn, extra limbs, bad anatomy, noise, complex background, photorealistic, gradient, muted colors
